name: Dawn Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Goa Kingdom is located. Home island of Luffy, Dragon and Garp. Adopted home of Ace

name: Goat Island
description: Island where Luffy first met Koby and Alvida. Only appeared in the manga

name: Yotsuba Island
description: Island where Shells Town is located

name: Shimotsuki's Village Island
description: Unnamed Island where Shimotsuki Village is located

name: Organ Islands
description: Archipelago where Orange Town is located

name: Island of Rare Animals
description: Island populated by bizarre hybrid animals, Gaimon and Sarfunkel

name: Gecko Islands
description: Island where Syrup Village is located

name: Conomi Islands
description: Archipelago located in the northwestern region of the East Blue. It is where Cocoyasi Village is located

name: 16th Branch's Island
description: Island where the Marine 16th Branch of the Marines commanded by captain Nezumi is located

name: Polestar Islands
description: Island where Loguetown is located. Almost all East Blue ships come here to resupply for the Grand Line. Birthplace and execution site of Gol D. Roger

name: Kumate Island
description: Home of the Kumate Tribe

name: Mirror Ball Island
description: Island where Jango traveled after Syrup Village

name: Cozia
description: Island that was attacked by Germa 66 13 years ago

name: Oykot's Kingdom Island
description: Country where Bell-mère first met Nami and Nojiko

name: Sixis
description: Island where Ace was stranded during the start of his journey

name: Frauce's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Frauce Kingdom is located

name: Nagagutsu's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Nagagutsu Kingdom is located

name: Satsuruzo's Kingdom Island
description: Island where Satsuruzo Kingdom is located. Home island of Koby

name: Ohara
description: Island that consisted primarly of archaeologists and is also the birthplace of Nico Robin. It was destroyed 22 years ago by a Buster Call

name: Ilisia's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Ilisia Kingdom is located

name: Toroa
description: Home island of Byron

name: Las Camp
description: Island that got attacked by pirates after Whitebeard's death

name: Kano's Country Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Kano Kingdom is located. Home island of the Chinjao Family

name: Ballywood's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Ballywood Kingdom is located

name: God Valley
description: Island where the God Valley Incident took place. Home island of Shanks, Shamrock, Xebec, and other Davy clan members. The island has since disappeared without a trace

name: Soja Island
description: World government affiliated island and the place where Issho lived prior to joining the Marines

name: Lvneel's Kingdom Island
description: Home island of Mont Blanc Noland and also where he was executed

name: Downs
description: Island where Donquixote Doflamingo founded the gang that preceded the Donquixote Pirates

name: Spider Miles' Island
description: Spider Miles is a port town in an unnamed North Blue island. Doflamingo hid here for 16 years after he fled from Mary Geoise

name: Flevance's Island
description: Home island of Trafalgar Law, notable for its Amber Lead

name: Rubeck Island
description: Diez Barrels was going to trade the Ope Ope no Mi to the Marines here 13 years ago

name: Swallow Island
description: Island found on the south of Minion Island and Rubeck Island. Temporary base for the Donquixote Pirates and the place where Law met Bepo, Penguin and Shachi

name: Minion Island
description: Island where Law obtained his Ope Ope no Mi powers and Rosinante died by the hands of his elder brother Doflamingo

name: Rakesh's Island
description: Doflamingo sent Gladius, Señor Pink, Giolla, Machvise and Baby 5 to attack this port town

name: Notice's Island
description: Island where the Bellamy Pirates were born. They found this place boring and left it for a life of piracy

name: Kuen's Village Island
description: Home island of Baby 5

name: Deul's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Deul Kingdom is located

name: Whiteland's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Whiteland Kingdom is located

name: Briss' Kingdom Island
description: Island where the Briss Kingdom is located. St. Briss had come from this country

name: Karate Island
description: People can master many types oof martial arts in this island. Jerry from CP6 trained here

name: Centaurea's Island
description: 12 years ago, the Revolutionary Army and an unknown force battled for the control of the country

name: Torino Kingdom
description: Small island with a huge tree growing in the middle of it. Chopper was sent here by Kuma

name: Baterilla
description: Home island of Portgas D Ace

name: Evil Black Drum's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Evil Black Drum Kingdom is located

name: Sorbet's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the Sorbet Kingdom is located. Once ruled by Bartholomew Kuma

name: Samba's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Samba Kingdom is located

name: Roshwan's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Roshwan Kingdom is located

name: Tumi's Island
description: Island that was conquered by the Revolutionary Army around 12 years ago

name: Kutsukku Island
description: Home island of Kid, Killer, Heat and Wire

name: Taya's Kingdom Island
description: Home island of Aramaki

name: Vespa's Kingdom Island
description: Home island of Kuzan

name: Samuwanai Island
description: Home island of Ida

name: Island of Women
description: Island where Amazon Lily is located

name: Impel Down
description: Island where the Underwater Prison Impel Down is located

name: Rusukaina
description: Island northwest of Amazon Lily. Harsh island that has 48 seasons a year. It was here that Luffy spent 2 years honing his skills and mastering Haki

name: Nanimonai Island
description: Uninhabited island just before Arabasta Kingdom. Only mentioned, never seen

name: Renaisse
description: Island where Smoker and Tashigi captured Mr.11

name: Cactus Island
description: Island where Whisky Peak is located

name: Little Garden
description: Island inhabited by dinosaurs due to its climate. The 100 years duel between Dorry and Broggy took place here

name: Kyuka Island
description: Island where Mr.3 and Miss Goldenweek took their days off when they were not on missions

name: Drum Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Sakura Kingdom is located

name: Sandy Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Arabasta Kingdom is located

name: Jaya
description: Lawless island popular with pirates. 400 years ago, it was the homeland of the Shandia, at the time in the shape of a skull and much larger than it is now

name: Long Ring Long Land
description: Archipelago that is preceded by Skypiea and followed by Water 7 if following the Log Pose

name: Ukkari Hot-Spring Island
description: Island where Gedatsu landed after being defeated in Skypiea

name: Water 7
description: Island known for its shipwrights. Capital of Water

name: Enies Lobby
description: World Government-controlled stronghold. Judicial Island . Its gate leads to both Marineford and Impel Down

name: Scrap Island
description: Island made up of the wrecked remains of hundreds of abandoned ships. Connected to Water 7 by a large stone bridge

name: San Faldo
description: Island city connected to Water 7 via the Sea Train. Known as the Carnival Town

name: Pucci
description: Island city connected to Water 7 via the Sea Train. Known as the Gourmet City

name: St. Poplar
description: Island city connected to Water 7 via the Sea Train. Known as the Town of the Spring Queen

name: Thriller Bark
description: Giant ship ruled by Gecko Moria that got abandonded after his defeat. Originally from the West Blue

name: Sabaody Archipelago
description: Island at the end of Paradise, close to the Red Line. Massive mangrove forest frowing out from the middle of the ocean with each tree of the forest serving as an island on which people live

name: Marineford
description: Island where the Marine Base G-1 is located. Former location of Marine Headquarters

name: Banaro Island
description: Island that was ransacked by Blackbeard and his crew. Close to Water 7

name: G-2's Island
description: Island where the Marine Base G-2 is located. North-east of Lulusia Kingdom

name: Karakuri Island
description: Island where the Future Country Baldimore is located. It is where Dr. Tsukimi built his own automata and were Franky was sent by Kuma

name: Momoiro Island
description: Island where the Kamabakka Kingdom is located. Location of the Revolutionary Army base of operations

name: Boin Archipelago
description: Series of flower-shaped islands where Usopp was sent by Kuma after Sabaody

name: Namakura Island
description: Island where the nation of Harahettania is located. Brook was sent here by Kuma after Sabaody

name: Kuraigana Island
description: Island that was once home of the Shikkearu Kingdom. Zoro was sent here by Kuma after Sabaody. Former residence of Dracule Mihawk

name: Foolshout Island
description: Home island of Koala

name: Guanhao
description: Island where the World Government organized a training camp for future Cipher Pol agents
notable_locations: Tower with trees on the roof

name: Kenzan Island
description: Island where the Tehna Gehna Kingdom is located. Seems to be the homeland of the Longarm Tribe

name: Lulusia's Kingdom Island
description: Was an island where the World Government affiliated Lulusia Kingdom was located. It was destroyed by Imu using an Ancient Weapon and was erased from history

name: Fish-Man Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Ryugu Kingdom is located, home of the fish-men and merfolk. It serves as an underway gateway to the New World for those who do not wish to cross over the Red Line above

name: Pants Hazard
description: Island located south of Karakuri Island and said to be set apart from the rest of the world. It is where Vegapants currently lives. The residents have a culture of wearing women's underwear over their heads

name: Hachinosu
description: Pirate Island currently occupied by the Blackbeard Pirates and where the legendary Rocks Pirates resided. Previously ruled by Ochoku until he was defeat around a year ago by Koby, Law and Blackbeard

name: Wano Country's Island
description: Island where the Wano Country is located. Previously occupied by the Beasts Pirates under Kaido, currently ruled by Kouzuki Momonosuke and location of the Ancient Weapon Pluton

name: Foodvalten
description: Island formerly protected by Whitebeard until his death. Brownbeard later claimed this island as his territory but was defeated by Hawkins after

name: New Marineford
description: Island that currently contains Marine Headquarters. Formerly contained Marine Base G-1 until Sakazuki changed bases' locations with former Marine Base G-1

name: G-5's Island
description: Island where Marine Base G-5 is located

name: Laugh Tale
description: Island at the end of the New World which supposedly holds the treasure One Piece. It was named by Roger. The four Road Poneglyphs lead to four locations which, if aligned, lead to Laugh Tale

name: Totto Land
description: Archipelago that constitutes the main territory of Big Mom and her crew. It has Whole Cake Island as Big Mom's base of operations, and 34 subsidiary islands arranged roughly in concentric circles. Each island is ruled by a member of the Charlotte Family as its minister

name: Punk Hazard
description: Island where Akainu and Aokiji had a battle during the timeskip over the Fleet Admiral position. First island the Straw Hats went to on the New World due to a distress call they received

name: Raijin Island
description: Island at the start of the New World and one of the three islands which someone has to travel to if they are following their Log Pose

name: Risky Red Island
description: Island at the start of the New World and one of the three islands which someone has to travel to if they are following their Log Pose

name: Mystoria Island
description: Island at the start of the New World and one of the three islands which someone has to travel to if they are following their Log Pose

name: Dressrosa
description: Island and one of the twenty kingdoms that founded the World Government, known as the Land of Love and Passion. Formerly ruled by Donquixote Doflamingo

name: Green Bit
description: Island located north of Dressrosa. Its underground is home to the Tontatta Kingdom

name: Zou
description: Island located on the back of a giant elephant named Zunesha. Home to the Mokomo Dukedom of the Mink Tribe

name: Prodence's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Prodence Kingdom is located

name: Mogaro's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the Mogaro Kingdom is located and where the Funk Brothers came from

name: Jewel Ice Sheet's Island
description: Island where the Jewel Ice Sheet, a treasure cache frozen beneath extremely hard ice, is located. Chinjao broke through this ice 13 years ago with his head

name: Doerena's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the Doerena Kingdom is located. Some noble of the kingdom travelled to Dressrosa to compete in the Corrida Colosseum

name: Majiatsuka's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the Majiatsuka Kingdom is located and where Rolling Logan comes from

name: Applenine Island
description: One of the three islands neighboring Dressrosa

name: Karai Bari Island
description: Island currently occupied by Buggy's Delivery, which has since integrated into the Cross Guild

name: Broc Coli Island
description: Island that is about 2 days ago from Whole Cake Island

name: Elbaph Island
description: Island where the Warland Kingdom is located. Considered to be the strongest country in the world due to its mighty giant warriors

name: Germa Kingdom
description: World's only seafaring kingdom, ruled by Vinsmoke Judge and formerly affiliated with the World Government

name: Port Chibaralta Island
description: Island that was once territory of the Whitebeard Pirates

name: Sphinx
description: Island where Edward Newgate was born. Currently under Marco's protection

name: Lodestar Island
description: Penultimate island in the Grand Line and the last island that can be reached by following the Log Pose

name: Egghead
description: Island that houses the laboratory of Dr. Vegapunk . Designed to be 500 years into the future, it became labelled as Future Island

name: G-9's Island
description: Island where the Marine Base G-9 is located

name: G-14's Island
description: Island where the Marine Base G-14 is located

name: Winner Island
description: Island northeast of Wano Country. Law selected this route from Wano and he and his crew were defeated here by the Blackbeard Pirates

name: Gartel Island
description: Island under the protection of the Red Hair Pirates . Bartolomeo and his crew were defeated here by them

name: Bunt's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the Bunt Kingdom is located. Over 105 years ago, Ida washed up on the shore and was saved by the human citizens. She was given a job at the local circus here to earn a living while she recovered

name: Enishi Island
description: Island that has a non-affiliated World Government region in it and once aided Elbaph during a famine

name: Foot Colony's Island
description: Island where the International Philanthropy Federation's temple, Foot Colony was located 44 years ago until it was raided and destroyed by the Rocks Pirates

name: Skypiea
description: Island located in the sky above Paradise

name: Birka
description: Island located in the sky above Paradise , far to the southeast of Skypiea until its destruction. Home island of Enel

name: Weatheria
description: Artificial sky island where Nami was sent by Kuma during Sabaody

name: Ballon Terminal
description: Island located in the sky above the New World

name: Merveille
description: Archipelago located in the sky above Paradise that served as the base of operations for the Golden Lion Pirates

name: Vira's Island
description: Island somewhere in the Grand Line where a small country named Vira is located. The government was eventually overthrown by the Revolutionary Army

name: Yukiryu Island
description: Island where Shanks and his crew were staying when they received a call from Rockstar about Whitebeard tearing up a message he wanted to send him

name: Baltigo
description: Island somewhere in the Grand Line where the Headquarters of the Revolutionary Army were located until they were destroyed by the Blackbeard Pirates. Robin spent 2 years here training

name: G-3's Island
description: Island somewhere in the Grand Line where the Marine Base G-3 is located

name: Bourgeois' Kingdom Island
description: Island somewhere in the Grand Line where the Bourgeois Kingdom is located from which Cavendish hails

name: Standing's Kingdom Island
description: Island somewhere in the Grand Line where the Standing Kingdom is located. Orlumbus' home nation

name: Eigis' Kingdom Island
description: Island somewhere in the Grand Line where the World Government affiliated Eigis Kingdom is located. The citizens of the kingdom participated in the Eight-Nation Revolution, rebelling against their monarchs

name: Vodka's Kingdom Island
description: Island somewhere in the Grand Line where the World Government affiliated Vodka Kingdom is located. Kaido lived here when he was a kid

name: Aoi's Kingdom Island
description: Island somewhere in the Grand Line where the Aoi Kingdom is located. Fujitora acted as the defense military chief

name: Shade's Port Island
description: Island somewhere in the Grand Line where Blackbeard was born

name: Porco's Kingdom Island
description: Island somewhere in the Grand Line where the Porco Kingdom is located and where Ginny was born

name: Mt. Kintoki's Island
description: Island somewhere in the Grand Line where Mt. Kintoki is located and where Sentomaru was born

name: Land of Ice's Island
description: Island where the Land of Ice is located. 500 years ago, Oars died here due to its low temperature

name: Rommel's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the Rommel Kingdom is located and where the legend of Hakuba originated

name: Tajine's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Tajine Kingdom is located

name: Shishano's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Shishano Kingdom is located

name: Bestland's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Bestland Kingdom is located

name: South Fire's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated South Fire Kingdom is located

name: Ringo's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Ringo Kingdom is located

name: Czacho's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Czacho Kingdom is located

name: Jambalaya's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Jambalaya Kingdom is located

name: Gingapore's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Gingapore Kingdom is located

name: Cameron's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Cameron Kingdom is located

name: Beef's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the World Government affiliated Beef Kingdom is located

name: Pepe's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the Pepe Kingdom is located. Extremely impoverished, as it is said that a thousand of its citizens die of hunger each year

name: Micqueot's Island
description: Place that is renowned for its vineyards and the production of the Ithürzburger Stein wine. It was mentioned by Fullbody at the Baratie

name: Mt. Mauri's Island
description: Island where Mt Mauri is located. It is known to the Big Mom Pirates, as Smoothie offered Mt. Mauri lava as a drink to the guests

name: Sankan's Kingdom Island
description: Island where the Sankan Kingdom is located

name: G-4's Island
description: Island somewhere in the Grand Line where the Marine Base G-4 is located. Fake Straw Hat crew is imprisoned here

name: Marine GS General Hospital's Island
description: Island somewhere in the Grand Line where the Marine GS General Hospital is located. Members of SWORD were recovering here after the Hachinosu raid

name: G-11's Island
description: Island somewhere in the Grand Line where the Marine Base G-11 is located

name: Yano Country's Island
description: Home island of Shiki. Described as a rougher version of Wano Country
